text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At last, it's the day of the Mainichi Okan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a showdown between three top talents.
Silence Suzuka, the Otherworldly Front-Runner,
El Condor Pasa, the Phantom Bird, and Grass
Wonder, the Beast's Successor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The venue is filled with excited spectators ready
to watch what is bound to be a truly incredible
race.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The crowd is electric today.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm just going to take the lead, as always.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What's there to be nervous about?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mind if I butt in, Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Both El and Grass asked me to give you a
message.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What kind of message?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um... El said, let's see... Ahem.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"You're goin' down today so I can continue my
journey to become the world's strongest racer!"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: "Get ready to eat my dust!"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's it!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (She sounded exactly like El!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: As for Grass...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: "Let's have a good race."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And that's it!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...That's it?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I know it doesn't seem like much, but I'm
pretty sure Grass is just as fired up as El!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
They told me to give you the message to let you
know they're excited to race against you.
choice_data_list: Well, that's gotta make you nervous.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, nope. In fact, I feel even more eager to get
out there.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The stronger the runners that I leave behind me
are, the prettier the scenery gets.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week is taken aback upon hearing
Suzuka's words.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hey, can I return the message?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I want 'em to know how fired up you are too! I
know they'll appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I don't mind. You're quite fired up yourself, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! It's 'cause all my friends are racing! The
energy's contagious!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I'm totally in the way, aren't I?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Just know I'm rooting for you, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: See you later!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, it seems that way.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
However, no matter what those two are striving
for, I won't give up the lead to either of them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the stage is set for a thrilling Mainichi
Okan!
